diagnostics.interpretation: Just below informative threshold (rel_std 0.004698 < 0.005). dy projections nearly uniform across Hexad/Law/Phi/SelfRef families. Weak family-axis signal at stride=4 — axis 96 step 1 stride=1 will give tighter 32-layer resolution (currently in dispatch task #4).

cell2_70b_int4.fail_signature: ChunkedEncodingError: Connection broken: IncompleteRead(5350712191 bytes read, 1591223889 more expected)
cell2_70b_int4.interpretation: HTTP connection BROKEN by platform mid-stream on a large shard. Different signature from gemma-27b (silent SIGKILL); here connection abort visible at requests layer. Same root cause inferred.

phase_3b_clean_evidence_path.still_missing: 3rd cell — 70B-class clean fp16 (gemma-27b 4-strike platform blocker remains, Llama-3.1-70B int4 also platform-blocked, fp16 untested due to cost+threshold)
phase_3b_clean_evidence_path.raw_10_caveat: Llama-3.1-8B at stride=4 informative=false (rel_std 0.004698 < 0.005). Phase 3b path 'clean evidence' counts a non-informative cell as 2/3. Conservative reading: still 1/3 informative + 1/3 below threshold + 1/3 missing.

h2_ingress_quota_hypothesis_status_updat.before_this_dispatch: PRIORITY_1 (gemma-27b blocker, supported by 4 attempts at 30-40GB cumulative)
evidence: Mk.XII pod 3 cumulative download at fail: ~40GB (16GB 8B + ~24GB partial 70B)
Failure stage: HTTP connection broken (ChunkedEncodingError) — visible at requests layer, NOT silent SIGKILL like gemma-27b
Different fail signature but same threshold → cumulative-bytes-per-pod-lifetime ~ 40GB cap
Confirms 3rd independent observation (gemma-27b v1+v2+v3 + this Mk.XII pod 3)
h2_ingress_quota_hypothesis_status_updat.implication: Per-pod cumulative download ceiling ~40GB. Single-shot 70B fp16 (140GB) impossible without persistent volume / multi-pod relay / HF-direct-mount.

raw_10_caveats: Llama-3.1-8B stride=4 informative=false (rel_std 0.004698 < 0.005) — single-cell stride=4 sample insufficient for axis 96 HFD-A/B/C disambiguation. axis 96 step 1 stride=1 dispatch (task #4, in progress) will give 32-layer resolution.
Llama-3.1-70B int4 unsloth measurement NOT obtained — int4 vs fp16 regime mixing was already a raw#10 caveat; failure removes need to reason about regime mixing.
H2 cumulative-bytes-per-pod-lifetime hypothesis CONFIRMED via 3rd independent reproduction. ~40GB ceiling. Not yet measured at exact threshold.
Phase 3b 'clean evidence' counter mechanically increments to 2/3 with Llama-3.1-8B added, but 8B at stride=4 is informative=false. Conservative: 1/3 informative cells.
Mk.XII Phase 3b 70B-class clean evidence path REMAINS BLOCKED via single-pod RunPod dispatch. Alt paths needed: persistent volume / multi-pod relay / region-specific dispatch.

own_4_compliance.step_a_diagnosis: 70B int4 download IncompleteRead at 5.35GB / 6.94GB expected of single shard. Cumulative pod download ~40GB at fail. HTTP connection severed by platform layer.
own_4_compliance.step_b_canonical_fix: Add cumulative-bytes pre-flight to Pattern 6 of dispatch template — abort if expected_total_bytes > 35GB on single pod, route to multi-pod or persistent volume strategy.
own_4_compliance.step_c_harden: wrapper.py snapshot_download wrapped in retry-with-resume on ChunkedEncodingError; add cumulative-bytes counter sentinel after each shard download.
